content.en:
Tomb of the Ancestral God.

On this day, a figure appeared in front of the tomb of the ancestral god, and this figure was Ye Tian.

"Here we go again!"

Ye Tian muttered.

It is not so easy to enter the tomb of the ancestral god, at least it takes someone who dominates the realm to tear the entrance, and Ye Tian before can't do it.

Now, Ye Tian has reached the peak realm of the galaxy level, and his combat power can be regarded as reaching the master level, there is no problem in entering the tomb of the ancestral god alone, otherwise he would not come alone.

Standing in front of the tombstone of the ancestral god, Ye Tian mobilized his strength to act on the tombstone, trying to tear out a spatial vortex.

And Ye Tian also used the space talent!!

Bang!!!

The tombstone was torn out of a spatial vortex by Ye Tian, leading into the tomb of the ancestral god.

"It worked!"

Ye Tian didn't say a word, and flew directly into the whirlpool and entered the tomb of the ancestral god.

......

As soon as he entered the tomb of the ancestral god, Ye Tian looked around, there was silence here, and there was no innate blood.

Obviously, those three Dominant-level Innate Blood Sons did not arrange for their subordinates to be stationed here.

"It seems that those three Dominant-level Innate Blood Sons think that I won't come again!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Last time, he was very vigilant and sneaked into the tomb of the ancestral god with a hidden aura, but now he didn't have to.

"Let's go straight to the ancestral temple of this ancestral god's tomb!"

Ye Tian stepped forward, and his momentum was not concealed at all.

Ye Tian's speed was very fast, and he soon approached the Ancestral God Temple.

And at this time, some innate blood naturally poured in.

These innate bloodies, who didn't have much wisdom, didn't know Ye Tian's strength and terror at all, and rushed up.

"Die!"

Ye Tian snorted lightly, and his silent breath directly crushed these innate blood.

"It's too weak!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

The cultivation of these innate blood sons is too weak, although some of the innate blood sons have the strength of the galaxy level, but their combat power is not as good as the galaxy level among the human beings, for him, a trace of breath can wipe them out countless times.

When Ye Tian continued to kill these innate blood sons without concealing his own aura at all, the three master-level innate blood sons of the Ancestral God Hall naturally sensed it.

Temple of the Ancestors.

"The familiar breath is that outside cultivator, he has come in again, we must kill him!"

One of the Dominant-level Innate Blood Sons roared angrily.

"Let's go, the three of us go over together and kill him!"

Whew!!

The three master-level innate blood sons rushed out of the Ancestral God Temple, and they no longer guarded the Ancestral God Temple.

They had only one goal, and that was to kill Ye Tian.

Soon, the three Dominant-level Innate Blood Sons met with Ye Tian.

"You're here!"

Ye Tian said in a very flat tone.

"Up!"

The three Dominant-level Innate Blood Sons were ready to do it, and they didn't talk nonsense at all.

And Ye Tian also made a move, and he did it with all his might.

Bang!!!!

The appearance of the chaotic Haifa phase enveloped the area.

And a terrifying statue of a god and demon rose from the chaos of the sea.

"Chaos God Golem!"

This is Ye Tian's new Chaos True Technique, and it is also the most terrifying Chaos True Technique.

The huge Chaos God Golem rushed towards the three dominant-level innate bloods, and the terrifying power shook the Tomb of the Ancestral God, causing the Tomb of the Ancestral God to tremble slightly.

"This ......"

The three congenital bloods were stunned.

From the point of view of cultivation, Ye Tian is only the peak of the galaxy level, but his combat power is too terrifying!

This is already far beyond their cognition of combat power!

"Run!"

The three dominant-level innate blood sons were extremely frightened, and they had no desire to fight.

Once they were hit by the Chaos God Golem, even if they were blessed by the Tomb of the Ancestral God, it would be difficult for them to die.

That's when it happened.

A spear pierced through the chest of one of the Dominant-level Innate Blood Sons, and the terrifying spatial power instantly shattered the vitality of the Domination-level Innate Blood Sons.

The Hell Divine Sky Spear of the Xiaocheng Realm instantly obliterated this Dominator-level Innate Blood Son and annihilated the small universe in his body.

And Ye Tian's space power and time power blocked this piece of time and space, and the other two Dominant-level innate bloodies didn't have time to escape at all, so they were grabbed by the hands of the Chaos God Demon.

"Die!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

Rumble!!!

The two Dominant-level Innate Blood Sons were pinched to death by the Chaos God Golem, like ants.

"What a weak master!"

Ye Tian commented.

Next, Ye Tian spent a little more time sweeping the Tomb of the Ancestral God and killing all the innate blood.

At this point, the tomb of the ancestral god has become a real cemetery.

The Holy Land of the Tomb of the Ancestral God, the place where the Silverhorn Ancestral God died.

Ye Tian came here, it was difficult for him to get close to the corpse of the Silver Horn Ancestral God at the beginning, and he was able to get close with the help of the power of the Chaos Black Lotus, but now Ye Tian was able to get close with his own strength.

"I hope that the Silver Horn Ancestral God still has a top-level treasure on his body, don't let me down!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian kept getting closer to the corpse of the Silver Horn Ancestral God, and his divine sense continued to search around.

From the outside, there is nothing good on the corpse of the Silver Horn Ancestral God, but the Silver Horn Ancestor God, as the supreme level, must have a small universe inside his body, if it is a normal supreme, the small universe cannot be preserved for too long, but this Silver Horn Ancestor God was buried in the tomb of the ancestor god by heaven and earth after his death, the body and body are well preserved, it is difficult to decay, and it is obvious that the small universe is also very likely to be preserved.

If the Silver Horn Ancestral God really preserved the top-level treasure, it would most likely be in the small universe.

Ye Tian stood on top of the corpse of the Silver Horn Ancestral God, constantly inducing.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian stepped on the corner of the silver horn and stepped on the corpse of the Silver Horn Ancestral God, which suddenly produced a huge fluctuation.

At this moment, Ye Tian was shocked back by the power of the Supreme, but it also made Ye Tian feel a trace of spatial fluctuations.

"Escape!"

Ye Tian used the second-grade super-god-level space-time talent to capture this wisp of spatial fluctuations, and then escaped into it.

Wow!

Ye Tianxia found himself in another void in an instant, which was very panicked, and there were spatial cracks everywhere between heaven and earth.

But there are unique rules here, which are different from the rules of the outside world.

Of course, there is still no way to shield the rules of the universe here, and it is still under the management of the rules of the universe.

"This is a small universe, but a small universe on the verge of shattering, otherwise I wouldn't be able to come in!" Ye Tian guessed.

This small universe is very large, Ye Tian kept flying, and saw a lot of things, but many things still turned into ashes with the passage of time, leaving only some items that are almost eternal and immortal.

An ancestral god's collection, even if Ye Tian only harvested a little, it would be a bumper harvest!

A few hours passed.

Ye Tian suddenly sensed a powerful aura fluctuation, which belonged to the fluctuation of the weapon.

"Is it ......?"

Ye Tian flew over quickly.

Soon, he saw a broken sword!

This broken sword is the tip of the sword, and there are many cracks on the blade, but its aura has far surpassed that of the origin artifact.

"No, it is a companion treasure, there is the breath of heaven and earth on the sword body, it is born from heaven and earth, not a weapon, it is very likely to be the companion treasure of the Silver Horn Ancestral God. Unexpectedly, the companion treasure of the Silver Horn Ancestral God is a sword! It's a pity that I'm good at the way of the sword, not the way of the sword, and it would be a waste of time to practice the way of the sword again!"

Ye Tian sighed.

Of course, this can't be said that this sword is useless to Ye Tian, he can ask someone to transform this sword and transform the broken sword into a knife, but the power is slightly weaker, plus this accompanying arcana, the power of its transformation is estimated to be much more powerful than ordinary arcana, but it is not as good as the ordinary top arcana, it belongs to the pseudo-top arcana!

"The pseudo-top-level Arcana level is just right for me, if it is a complete top-level Arcana, I can't exert my true power, this time it's a big profit!"

Ye Tian was very excited to receive this Companion Supreme Treasure Broken Sword.
